Γ : Type u_1
inst✝² : Inhabited Γ
Λ : Type u_2
inst✝¹ : Inhabited Λ
σ : Type u_3
inst✝ : Inhabited σ
n : ℕ
enc : Γ → Vector Bool n
dec : Vector Bool n → Γ
S : Finset Λ'
l : List Bool
q : Stmt Bool Λ' σ
⊢ SupportsStmt S (write l q) = SupportsStmt S q

Γ : Type u_1
inst✝² : Inhabited Γ
Λ : Type u_2
inst✝¹ : Inhabited Λ
σ : Type u_3
inst✝ : Inhabited σ
n : ℕ
enc : Γ → Vector Bool n
dec : Vector Bool n → Γ
S : Finset Λ'
l : List Bool
q : Stmt Bool Λ' σ
⊢ (match write l q with
    | Stmt.move a q => SupportsStmt S q
    | Stmt.write a q => SupportsStmt S q
    | Stmt.load a q => SupportsStmt S q
    | Stmt.branch a q₁ q₂ => SupportsStmt S q₁ ∧ SupportsStmt S q₂
    | Stmt.goto l => ∀ (a : Bool) (v : σ), l a v ∈ S
    | Stmt.halt => True) =
    match q with
    | Stmt.move a q => SupportsStmt S q
    | Stmt.write a q => SupportsStmt S q
    | Stmt.load a q => SupportsStmt S q
    | Stmt.branch a q₁ q₂ => SupportsStmt S q₁ ∧ SupportsStmt S q₂
    | Stmt.goto l => ∀ (a : Bool) (v : σ), l a v ∈ S
    | Stmt.halt => True

α : Type u_1
c : RBColor
n : Nat
cmp : α → α → Ordering
v : α
t : RBNode α
h : t.Balanced c n
⊢ ∃ c' n',
    (match t.isRed with
        | red =>
          (match t with
            | nil => node red nil v nil
            | node red a y b =>
              match cmp v y with
              | Ordering.lt => node red (ins cmp v a) y b
              | Ordering.gt => node red a y (ins cmp v b)
              | Ordering.eq => node red a v b
            | node black a y b =>
              match cmp v y with
              | Ordering.lt => (ins cmp v a).balance1 y b
              | Ordering.gt => a.balance2 y (ins cmp v b)
              | Ordering.eq => node black a v b).setBlack
        | black =>
          match t with
          | nil => node red nil v nil
          | node red a y b =>
            match cmp v y with
            | Ordering.lt => node red (ins cmp v a) y b
            | Ordering.gt => node red a y (ins cmp v b)
            | Ordering.eq => node red a v b
          | node black a y b =>
            match cmp v y with
            | Ordering.lt => (ins cmp v a).balance1 y b
            | Ordering.gt => a.balance2 y (ins cmp v b)
            | Ordering.eq => node black a v b).Balanced
      c' n'
